form.formComment: Last start 5th of 9 at this track on March 30 over 1000m, 0.9 len behind Flying Finley with 56.5kg at $7. Before that won by a nose at Durbanville March 4 over 1000m defeating Catch A Penny carrying 57kg at $2.80. Not far from the winner last time but this is a tough assignment.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6.5). Last start 5th of 9 at this track on March 30 over 1000m, 0.9 len behind Flying Finley with 56.5kg at $7. Before that won by a nose at Durbanville March 4 over 1000m defeating Catch A Penny carrying 57kg at $2.80. Not far from the winner last time but this is a tough assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride.
Cast its left front shoe shortly before the finish.
Jumped slow, losing one length.
Slow into stride.
Raced awkwardly on the turn.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after three months ran last in a small field at Durbanville on March 4 over 1000m, 6 len behind Sardinia Bay carrying 61.5kg at $9. Previously second-up 2nd of 10 at Scottsville on June 16 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Luhamba Phambili with 48.0kg at $11. Don't underestimate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Second-up. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after three months ran last in a small field at Durbanville on March 4 over 1000m, 6 len behind Sardinia Bay carrying 61.5kg at $9. Previously second-up 2nd of 10 at Scottsville on June 16 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Luhamba Phambili with 48.0kg at $11. Don't underestimate.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Brushed on two occasions with North Point shortly after the start.
Hanging out in the latter stages.
Shortly after the start, App J Botes was knocked on the skull cap by Kaiboy.
Hung in from the 700m.
Made contact leaving the stalls.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation when last of 13 at Turffontein Standside January 11 over 1160m, 11 len behind Almond Sea carrying 54kg at $101. First up last campaign fifth of 10 at Vaal October 9 over 1000m, 2 len behind Truth with 50kg at $41. Will struggle against these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-14). First-up. Finished off last preparation when last of 13 at Turffontein Standside January 11 over 1160m, 11 len behind Almond Sea carrying 54kg at $101. First up last campaign fifth of 10 at Vaal October 9 over 1000m, 2 len behind Truth with 50kg at $41. Will struggle against these.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had to ease leaving the 150m.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 4th in a small field at Durbanville on March 4 over 1000m, 1.4 len behind Sardinia Bay carrying 55.5kg at $51. Second run from a spell won by a head at this track March 30 over 1000m defeating Lyrical Gangster with 61.5kg at $6.50. Should be near his top.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6.5). Third-up today. Resuming 4th in a small field at Durbanville on March 4 over 1000m, 1.4 len behind Sardinia Bay carrying 55.5kg at $51. Second run from a spell won by a head at this track March 30 over 1000m defeating Lyrical Gangster with 61.5kg at $6.50. Should be near his top.

form.formComment: Most recently 8th of 13 at this track on April 1 over 1100m, 2 len behind Dance Variety carrying 52.5kg at $7. The race before that second last in a small field at Durbanville on March 4 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Sardinia Bay with 60kg at $3.50. Not far away last time. In the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8). Most recently 8th of 13 at this track on April 1 over 1100m, 2 len behind Dance Variety carrying 52.5kg at $7. The race before that second last in a small field at Durbanville on March 4 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Sardinia Bay with 60kg at $3.50. Not far away last time. In the mix again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 100m, Dance Variety shifted in away from this horse.
Brushed on two occasions with Un Bel Di shortly after the start.
Hung out from the 500m.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after three months 2nd in a small field at Durbanville on March 4 over 1000m, 0.8 len behind Sardinia Bay carrying 60kg at $8. Previously second-up 8th of 14 at this track in the G3 Southern Cross Stakes on December 6 over 1000m, 5 len behind Asiye Phambili with 55.5kg at $9. Improver with winning prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Second-up. Comes off a 42-day let-up. Previously second-up 8th of 14 at this track in the G3 Southern Cross Stakes on December 6 over 1000m, 5 len behind Asiye Phambili with 55.5kg at $9. Improver with winning prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced close to the inside running rail in the concluding stages.
Shifted inwards when under pressure in the closing stages.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 8 at this track December 10 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Demanding Dave carrying 55.5kg at $11. On debut second of 7 at this track June 21 over 1000m, soft track; 2.75 len behind October Storm with 57kg at $13.50. Will take a lot from this run but stays under notice.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. On debut second of 7 at this track June 21 over 1000m, soft track; 2.75 len behind October Storm with 57kg at $13.50. Will take a lot from this run but stays under notice.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted ground marginally.

form.formComment: Returns from a 42-day let-up. Last start 3rd in a small field at Durbanville on March 4 over 1000m, 1.2 len behind Sardinia Bay with 58.5kg at $3.80. The race before that 8th of 16 at this track on January 31 over 1100m, 2.25 len behind All The Rage carrying 56kg at $5. Thereabouts last start and should be competitive.

The race before that 8th of 16 at this track on January 31 over 1100m, 2.25 len behind All The Rage carrying 56kg at $5. Thereabouts last start and should be competitive.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: In the concluding stages, brushed the hindquarters of The Us Of A.
Shortly after the start, shifted ground and crowded October Storm.
Jumped outwards.
